title: DumpMyTags
description: Dumps all modpack item tags into a nice Markdown file.
body:
## 📜 Short description

  **Dumps all modpack item tags into a nice Markdown file.**  
  **/dumptags → creates a file with all modpack item tags in the dumpmytags/ folder**  
  **/dumptags <type> [modid] → creates a file with this type tags only from folder with this modid in the dumpmytags/ folder**  
  **Available types: items, blocks, biomes, entities, fluid and all → dump all types at once**

## ‼️ Warning
1. **Please, if you have published this mod on another site, provide a link to *CurseForge* or *Modrinth*, thanks in advance.**
